top_signals.title: Tech Stocks Slide as Oil Climbs on Hormuz Standoff
top_signals.summary:
A selloff in tech giants sent stocks lower, with the market also falling as oil jumped after clashes over the Strait of Hormuz raised concerns about a disruption in energy supplies that could fuel inflation.
Stuart Kaiser, Head: US Equity Trading Strategy at Citi gives his outlook on the markets and looks ahead to June CPI out Tuesday. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Oil Rallies as Conflict Over Hormuz Escalates With Fresh Strikes
top_signals.summary:
Oil gained after the US carried out another wave of strikes against Iran, with the two sides disputing whether the Strait of Hormuz was open.
Ed Morse, Senior Advisor and Commodity Strategist at Hartree Partners, discusses what's next for energy markets amid uncertainty in the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US to Raise Mexico Sugar Imports to 1.15 Million Metric Tons
top_signals.summary: The US Department of Agriculture estimates it will import as much as 1.15 million metric tons of Mexican sugar in the 2026-2027 period, according to a statement posted on X by Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Statement by President von der Leyen with the Co-Chairs of the Special Panel on child safety online
top_signals.summary: European Commission Statement Brussels, 13 Jul 2026 I want to thank you and all the members of the Special Panel, for your hard work in the recent months and your skilful steer. It is the evidence we have been waiting for, which you are delivering today. The Panel examined what I believe is one of the greatest challenges confronting today's governments – how to protect our kids online, how we establish a new norm in the future online world.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Why Horizon 22 Events by Searcys is a City icon
top_signals.summary: We have launched the Toast the City awards 2026 and throughout the year we’ll be speaking to some of our nominees – this week, Amber Holdforth, sales and marketing manager at Horizon 22 Events by Searcys tells us all the things she loves about the Square Mile. top_signals.title: The Pentagon’s Sprint to Get Tech Out of the Lab and to the Warfighter
top_signals.summary:
Joe Jewell left academia and his role directing hypersonic wind tunnels to oversee the Pentagon’s science and technology enterprise. He wants more researchers to make the same move. He joins Jonathan to discuss the Pentagon’s science enterprise, why he thinks academia is the envy of America’s closest allies, and how his office gets technology from the lab into the hands of the warfighter.Image: Gabriella White via DVIDS.

The post The Pentagon’s Sprint to Get Tech Out of the Lab and to the Warfighter appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Heavy floods submerge roads in northern China as Bavi weakens to tropical storm
top_signals.summary: Videos on social media ​showed people swimming along neighborhood streets China's northern Hebei province and northeastern Liaoning province following severe flooding.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Europe’s Hydis project settles on concept for hypersonic interceptor
top_signals.summary: Europe's push to field a hypersonic-defense interceptor will come down to two competing projects.
